{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240140158005D9D58346B982EEAB"}"},"total":5482},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7265726004529922872","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"情节精彩，笑点多起，全书毫无毒点！！
力荐，力荐让无人传颂的歌谣，再度启唱。 为历史尘封的故事， 续写新章。 高洁而纯真的灵魂，踏上旅途。 愿掠集之兽爱佑其身，赐予「空梦」的自由 愿渡尘之羽爱佑其身，赐予「浮生」的坚忍 愿绘世之卷爱佑其身，赐予「繁星」的纯真 愿噬界之蛇爱佑其身，赐予「无限」的渴求 愿黎明之哨爱佑其身，赐予「旭光」的意志 愿寸断之刃爱佑其身，赐予「刹那」的决绝 愿善法之瞳爱佑其身，赐予「天慧」的智识 愿坏劫之焱爱佑其身，赐予「鏖灭」的赤诚 愿愚戏之匣爱佑其身，赐予「螺旋」的奇迹 愿璀耀之歌爱佑其身，赐予「黄金」的光辉 愿深罪之槛爱佑其身，赐予「戒律」的慈爱 愿无烬之剑爱佑其身，赐予「救世」的理想 愿无暇之人爱佑其身，赐予「真我」的回归 我们于此赞颂"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691683856,"group_id":"7222948784999762947","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8f1wVTUDmiSaC2hoZy2yIyVU5RuhnEPkH4MvWTmFC8C","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/100f24f454454b4080cbf574d4277dfa~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776876690&x-signature=rmuMNiZTUGtUbkhNMqg%2B3JhNUkA%3D","user_id":"3394888937780648","user_name":"天下清风客"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3394888937780648","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1644129860,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7222948784999762947","book_info":{"abstract":"关键词：【申*急公好义*及时雨*古道热肠*轻色重义*呼保义*欢喜如来*豹豹佛】
申供宝一觉醒来，重生到了洪荒昆仑山。
我叫申供宝，竟穿越成了申公豹？那个封神结束后的分水将军？（堵北海眼将军）
谁懂啊，这是什么人间疾苦？
申公豹心中发誓，“我绝不出昆仑山，不出昆仑山，就不会跟姜子牙作对，最后也不用身死道消，做个堵海眼子的将军！”
可谁知，天命衰星系统宛若天降。
触发衰星的前提条件：
1.对方后背对着宿主。
2.宿主喊出，道友，请留步。
3.对方转身回应。
“慈航师兄，请留步，触发诅咒，获得1000点修为。”
“广成子师兄，请留步，触发诅咒，获得无上功法：九转玄元功”
“文殊师兄，请留步，触发诅咒，获得五五开大阵（狗进来了，也得五五开。）”
“燃灯副教主，请留步，霉上加霉，咒上加咒，获得至宝混沌珠。”
送完阐教，送西方。
“降龙道友，请留步，触发无敌诅咒，诛仙+万仙大阵完善及破解之法。”
“接引、准提道友，请留步，恭喜宿主原地证道混元大罗金仙。”
自老好人红云后，洪荒又多了一位古道衷肠的正派仙人，逢人就喊道友请留步。
洪荒诸大能瑟瑟发抖中，“卧槽！这辈子再也不想听到道友请留步，申公豹这厮着实可恶，吾等诅咒他生儿子没皮燕子！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4e0a58dec3216cdcdbf26a561b5b674a","author":"慈明无双","author_id":"","book_id":"7222948784999762947","book_name":"都逼我是吧？那就请道友上榜封神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7222949991143342626","read_count":"26878","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1280447"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"574","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bdd7eef1e77f03579a64cfa51f67a60f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779471615&x-signature=SkzTjUx9RnOlsMLREilZ5ScdGHA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4239305682209368","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.1332754e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240140158005D9D58346B982EEAB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":28,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11332,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":25010},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7412667032887903038","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书写的确实不错，作者对于神话的理解和深度，以及行文节奏把握非常好，很值得一看，开车的同时行文又合逻辑，非常好一篇，使我的五星旋转"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725899480,"group_id":"7222948784999762947","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+BlQ89DrfvGpufdccvA9hY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"935058069268040","user_name":"高耸入云的旱魃成长史"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"935058069268040","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7222948784999762947","book_info":{"abstract":"关键词：【申*急公好义*及时雨*古道热肠*轻色重义*呼保义*欢喜如来*豹豹佛】

洪荒诸大能瑟瑟发抖中，“卧槽！这辈子再也不想听到道友请留步，申公豹这厮着实可恶，吾等诅咒他生儿子没皮燕子！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/4e0a58dec3216cdcdbf26a561b5b674a","author":"慈明无双","author_id":"","book_id":"7222948784999762947","book_name":"都逼我是吧？那就请道友上榜封神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#301808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7222949991143342626","read_count":"26878","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1280447"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"574","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bdd7eef1e77f03579a64cfa51f67a60f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779471615&x-signature=SkzTjUx9RnOlsMLREilZ5ScdGHA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4239305682209368","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"49"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603240140158005D9D58346B982EEAB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5787,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5598},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7372562838818980670","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书我可谓是读了一周，写的非常精彩，当然我很庆幸在这本书完结之后开始读，让我深刻体会到作者的文笔，人物形象刻画的非常好，最后几章也像其他读者们说的，该填的坑，作者都填了，本书也没烂尾，是我为数不多喜爱的一本书，最后以一句话来证明你看过这本书：道友，请留步！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716560824,"group_id":"7222948784999762947","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个冷酷的作者，爱看书，爱写书！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N91U/STej3Vcwcyko8B3maEFz8bj8IcVp4ON92d0hI1C","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5240e905f80e4f0b8fc64303f9fc5afc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776874646&x-signature=Uwzcyslgl1QuHIrP8LEZ%2ByQXjNE%3D","user_id":"4450427783876903","user_name":"写出好书吧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4450427783876903","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7222948784999762947","book_info":{"abstract":"关键词：【申*急公好义*及时雨*古道热肠*轻色重义*呼保义*欢喜如来*豹豹佛】
